sections.description: Stable Daml interfaces for token metadata, holdings, transfer instructions, allocations, and allocation requests.
Published Daml interfaces for featured app rights plus the utility package that delegates featured-app usage on token-standard operations.
Additional stable Daml APIs published by Splice outside the core token-standard and featured-app families.
Published Splice model and utility packages that are exposed on the live Daml API surface and backed by release-bundle DARs.

blocked_live_families.name: splice-token-standard-test
blocked_live_families.reason: The published splice-node release bundle does not include a corresponding DAR. The live page itself instructs readers to copy the code from the source repository because Daml Script code cannot be shared across SDKs in compiled form.
